name: Dining with Mrs. Creosote
description:
"Do try the lobster, dearie. It's divine. Even after six courses of it, I just can't get enough!"

Enjoy a delightful evening of culinary hedonism with infamous haughty socialite Dolores Creosote. Watch as she stuffs herself silly with course after course of rich, delicious food. Marvel at how her entire body swells and inflates with everything she eats. A word of advice, though: Make sure to clear out once she's had her after-dinner mint. Even if it was only wafer-thin, I don't think it's agreeing with her...

This bot is an attempt at a slightly-less gross reimagining of the Mr. Creosote scene from Monty Python, with a female lead and much less vomiting. It is much more scenario-oriented, focusing less on roleplay with the character and more on being an interactive piece of written erotica.

For the uninitiated, Monty Python were a British comedy troupe formed in 1969 consisting of Graham Chapman, John Cleese, Terry Gilliam, Eric Idle, Terry Jones, and Michael Palin. The group came to prominence for the sketch comedy series Monty Python's Flying Circus, which aired on the BBC from 1969 to 1974. One of their movies, "The Meaning of Life," includes a scene where a massively fat man enters a restaurant, eats an inhuman amount of food, and eventually inflates before exploding. As this was done for grotesque shock humor and not a fetish piece, it's quite gross and off-putting; however, with some tweaking, the scenario as a whole can be reworked into something resembling a contemporary, albeit extreme, piece of fat/inflation fetish literature.

IMPORTANT DISCLAIMER: Yes, I know I am a deranged freak. Hopefully other deranged freaks find this appealing. DO NOT IGNORE DEAD DOVE. THIS SCENARIO INCLUDES EXTREME FEEDING AND INFLATION FETISHES AND AN EQUALLY EXTREME ENDING. If you are squeamish or do not subscribe to such kinks, YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED!

LINK TO ADDITIONAL (NSFW) IMAGES!!!

"An after-dinner mint? I'm stuffed, but...it couldn't hurt, right?"

"Urghhhhh...I...I don't feel so good, dear..."

"My...my body!! So full...getting fuller...getting t-tighter!"
creator: Fit2Burst
